source: real https://ai.google.dev/pricing static HTML — the gemini-3.1-flash-lite pricing-card region the web-verify parser consumes, byte-for-byte as served to a plain curl (no JS execution)
command: curl -sL https://ai.google.dev/pricing (trimmed to the flash-lite card region)
representativeRows: Input price: Free of charge | $0.25 (text / image / video) | $0.50 (audio) — the parser must take the PAID text rate, never the audio rate and never the free tier
Output price (including thinking tokens): the paid text rate that follows
grounding/RPD marketing prices ($35 / 1,000 grounded prompts) the parser must not misread as per-token rates
note: REAL bytes: the ai.google.dev/pricing gemini-3.1-flash-lite card region as served to a plain curl on 2026-07-08 — carries the paid text rate ($0.25) beside the audio rate ($0.50) and free tier the parser must skip, and the thinking-tokens-inclusive output price ($1.50).
